titleStmt.title: SII 7.362: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 362. (A.R. No. 164 of 1901). ON THE TENTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śa
ṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1311 vibhavasaṁ
vatsarada cayitra suddha 1 sōmavāradalu rājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū
¨rvva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttara samudrādhipati śrīvīrahariharama
hārāyara nirūpadiṁ mallappaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājyava pra
tipālaneya māḍuva kāladalli maṇigāṟakēriya kuppi seṭṭi
yaru cikkāyi tāyigaḷa kāladalli haravariyāgiddalli kuppi
seṭṭiyaru A¨rtthaparitsēdavāgi koṭṭu mūlaparitsēdavāgi cikkāI
tāyigaḷa kaiyali Eṟasikoṁḍu tāU baddaṁthā kaṭikiyabāḷa
nū Ā kuppiseṭṭiyū kuppiseṭṭiya kuṭuṁOŪ taṁmoḷēka
starāgi maṇigāṟakēriya sōmayya dēvaralli Ippattanālku ma
ṁdi brāhmaṇabhōjanakke dhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi mallappaOḍeyara sa
ṁnidhiyalu maṇigāṟakēriya halara muṁdiṭṭu Eṟadu koṭṭa
kaṭakeya bāḷa catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu bāvanabhaṭṭana bāḷi
ṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kaṁnyāneda bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu baḍagakareya heddāriya kalukaṭṭeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu duggāḷuvana bāḷa gaḍiya koraviyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yi(ṁ)ntī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa bāḷa vivara hiriya bhāgi 1 kke
bittuva mū 40 jaddāḍeya bhāgi 1 kke bittuva mū 50 caukila
da bhāgi 1 kke bittuva mū 50 Uḷimaṁṇa bhāgi . ge bittuva mu
ḍe 27 . Āḷuvittiya bhāgi . ge bittuva mū 25 koraḷabhāgi
bittuva mū 27 [.] gaṁṭigoḍege bhāgi . ge yaraḍu sasi bittuva
mū 28 kokkatūra bhāgi . ge bittuva mū 26 . kokkatūra bā
ḷa kaṁḍika bittuva mū 9 . kōḍugeṟeya gaṁḍika bittuva mu
12 A(ṁ)ntu bāgi 5 . kaṁḍika 2 kuduru 2 yiṣṭakkaṁ baya
lu mekke makki sahita bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugada
lu mū 293 . yiṣṭanū hiṁde kuppiseṭṭiyariṁgeThe inscription is left incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 7.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
